docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100046464) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-24-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
